channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: BuildBell - Sun Jun 21 20:47:22 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Matheus Souza downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: br.com.matheuhsouza.buildbell

item.title: JavaWiz - Thu Jun 25 06:48:27 UTC 2026
item.description:
